name: cleanup_tool
description: Pre-deployment sanity checker and cleanup tool. Scans directories for sensitive information (API keys, passwords, secrets, credentials), removes temporary files (.claude, __pycache__, .tmp, etc.), validates directory structure, and produces a readiness report. Intended to run manually or at the end of a tasking session.

target_dir.description: Absolute path to the directory to scan/clean.

dry_run.description: If true, report what would be done without actually deleting files.

output_report.description: Path to write the cleanup report to. If omitted, prints to stdout.

extra_patterns.description: Additional glob patterns to treat as temporary/deletable files.

session_id.description: Session ID for log_manager integration. Auto-injected by the engine.
